GA: UTM Setup in Ads Manager
Google Analytics Tracking Setup
This guide will explain how and where to set up your tracking links for ads in ads
manager.
Check back here on the actual URL string we use in ads manager.
Note, if you've only just started using my recommended UTM tracking then note
that you'll need to wait a few days to collect data for it to appear.
The data is also only available from that point forward.
And you'll need to edit ALL live ads to add the correct tracking too. Editing
existing ads does not (at time of writing) reset your ads but they *may* send the
ads back into review - test with a small number of ads as to whether they are
sent back to review and how long they're in review for, if they do hit review.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
